role: Pipeline authoring system: template authoring/instantiation, manifest validation, canonical hashing, graph inspection, plugin scaffolding for the afi.pipeline.v1 contract family (SLOT-FCP-FACTORY; replaceable authoring implementation per D-FCP-4 — not a protocol authority, not the executor)
notes: Consumes the afi-config governed contract family as a VENDORED byte-pinned schema closure (src/governed-schema/, afi-config@e462c4e8bef5fda946ca19a826f5c53c6d202151) — no package or file: dependency on afi-config; works from a clean clone

afi-reactor consumes the authored artifacts (SLOT-FCP-REACTOR merged); it holds no package or file: dependency on this repo — the temporary sequencing shims were removed under D-FCP-9 after the replacing slots' gates passed
